GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "The best pro skin treatments you can do in your lunch break, according to Vogue editors", "A lunchtime skin makeover, without stepping outside of David Jones.", "To test out how a professional treatment can change your skin in (almost) an instant, four Vogue staffers headed into the beauty rooms inside David Jones's beautifully renovated Elizabeth St Sydney store. Each editor was able to enjoy a luxurious skin treatment, selected to address their specific skin goals, as performed by the highly skilled professionals behind each counter. Vogue.com.au's digital editor Danielle Gay slid onto the cosy treatment table in La Mer's champagne-tinted treatment room to trial the brand's Custom Skincare Journey, an entirely tailored facial exclusive to David Jones Elizabeth Street. Designed to nurture the skin as much as the spirit, it includes a thorough consultation and indulgent massage of the arms and hands too. "It was a heavenly experience from the moment I stepped into the treatment space at David Jones. The therapist targeted key skin concerns with a bespoke combination of the Hydrating Facial and the Radiant Facial, leaving my skin hydrated, energised and with an instant glow," says Gay. Editor-in-chief Edwina McCann sampled a speedy treatment that didn't even require her to slide into a robe. La Prairie's Caviar Luxe Hand and Arm Treatment is an indulgent 10-minute service which you can enjoy from the comfort of a chair right at the counter, and includes a pampering hand and arm massage. "If you don't have time for a facial, this treatment is a great way to experience La Prairie's luxurious products. I adored the pressure point massage, as well as the Cellular Swiss Ice Crystal Dry Oil and the uplifting scent of the Energizing Body Mist," says McCann. Fashion features director Alice Birrell visited La Prairie for some perfecting, care of the White Caviar Illuminating Facial, an idyllic treatment using the White Caviar collection, which leaves skin firm and radiant. "Though this treatment is truly decadent it's surprising how easy it is to make a speedy transition back to the office. It's designed to combat dark spots and improve skin's luminosity, and there isn't a heavy feeling on your skin post-treatment so you can touch up with some make-up if necessary and be back at your desk with brighter, definitely dewier, skin. I would call this efficient luxury," says Birrell. Vogue's senior beauty and health editor Remy Rippon treated herself to Dermalogica's ProPower Peel 60, an hour long, completely customisable peel that promises major glow without any problematic after effects; with the entire treatment being redeemable on product. "A bespoke ProPower Peel from Dermalogica is my go-to for addressing my skin's ever-changing needs. And unlike other peels, there's no downtime so I can easily squeeze it into my lunch hour," says Rippon. Dani wears: Rejina Pyo top. Bassike pants. Boyy bag, from David Jones. Edwina wears: MSGM top and skirt. Chloe bag, from David Jones. Alice wears: Isabel Marant Etoile blazer and skirt. Jac +Jack tank top. Balenciaga bag, from David Jones. Remy wears: Aje jacket. Jac + Jack tank top. Ganni skirt. Boyy bag, from David Jones. Visit your nearest David Jones store to book your skin treatment."
